License server rate limiting reset on restart — FIXED: persistent file-backed rate limiting.
No atomic file writes — FIXED: all critical writes now use temp+rename pattern.
P1_HIGH: License database had no backup system — FIXED: auto-backup before every write with rolling 5-copy window.

No disk space monitoring — FIXED: alerts at 80% and 95% usage.
No scheduler self-healing — FIXED: watchdog auto-restarts up to 5x with exponential backoff.
No memory leak protection — FIXED: memory guard auto-restarts at 512MB.
Discord notifications had no retry — FIXED: 3x retry with exponential backoff + local file fallback.
CWS API had no retry/circuit breaker — FIXED: retry with backoff + circuit breaker (opens after 5 failures).

No request ID tracking — FIXED: UUID request IDs across all license server endpoints.
